revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.comment: =誕生日= 隠元隆琦新暦換算

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月4日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[安政]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1854年]][[12月23日]]） - [[駿河湾]]を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4の嘉永大地震。死者1万人以上。[[東海道]]が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破
== 誕生日 == * [[文禄]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1592年]][[12月7日]]） - [[隠元隆琦]]、[[明]]の禅僧・日本[[黄檗宗]]の開祖（+ [[1673年]]） * [[文政]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1825年]][[12月13日]]） - [[有馬新七]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（+ [[1862年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[応永]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1398年]][[12月12日]]） - [[足利氏満]]、[[武将]] * [[天正]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1591年]][[12月19日]]） - [[北条氏直]]、小田原城主（* [[1562年]]） * [[慶長]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1596年]][[12月23日]]） - [[服部半蔵正成]]、[[武将]]・[[伊賀]][[忍者]]の指導者（* [[1542年]]） * [[宝暦]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1756年]][[11月25日]]） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]]（親方出雲）、[[浄瑠璃]]作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[11月3日 (旧暦)|11月3日]] 翌日[[11月5日 (旧暦)|11月5日]] - 前月[[10月4日 (旧暦)|10月4日]] 翌月[[12月4日 (旧暦)|12月4日]] *新暦[[11月4日]]
{{stub}}

== 誕生日 == * [[文禄]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1592年]][[12月7日]]） - [[隠元隆琦]]、[[明]]の禅僧・日本[[黄檗宗]]の開祖（+ [[1673年]]） * [[文政]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1825年]][[12月13日]]） - [[有馬新七]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（+ [[1862年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[応永]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1398年]][[12月12日]]） - [[足利氏満]]、[[武将]] * [[天正]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1591年]][[12月19日]]） - [[北条氏直]]、[[小田原城|小田原城主]]（* [[1562年]]） * [[慶長]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1596年]][[12月23日]]） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]]、[[武将]]・[[伊賀国|伊賀]][[忍者]]の指導者（* [[1542年]]） * [[宝暦]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1756年]][[11月25日]]） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]]（親方出雲）、[[浄瑠璃]]作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|3|11|5|10|4|12|11|1104}}

{{Lunar November}} '''Lunar November4日'''（きゅうれきじゅういちがつよっか）は、[[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[嘉永]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1854年]][[12月23日]]） - [[駿河湾]]を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4の嘉永大地震（[[安政東海地震]]）。死者1万人以上。[[東海道]]が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870年]][[12月25日]]） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]]、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]]と改称。
== 誕生日 == * [[文禄]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1592年]][[12月7日]]） - [[隠元隆琦]]、[[明]]の禅僧・日本[[黄檗宗]]の開祖（+ [[1673年]]） * [[文政]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1825年]][[12月13日]]） - [[有馬新七]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（+ [[1862年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[応永]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1398年]][[12月12日]]） - [[足利氏満]]、[[武将]] * [[天正]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1591年]][[12月19日]]） - [[北条氏直]]、[[小田原城|小田原城主]]（* [[1562年]]） * [[慶長]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1596年]][[12月23日]]） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]]、[[武将]]・[[伊賀国|伊賀]][[忍者]]の指導者（* [[1542年]]） * [[宝暦]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1756年]][[11月25日]]） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]]（親方出雲）、[[浄瑠璃]]作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|3|11|5|10|4|12|11|1104}}
[[Category:kk]][[en:11月4日 (旧暦)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:japanese Lunar Calendar]][[ja:11月4日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunar November]] {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}}

revision.comment: idk what haoppened but removing and re-adding the template
Moving from [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] to [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding boilerplate intro to all the days
Text replacement - "六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]" to "六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]][[Category:友引]]"
Text replacement - "旧暦}}" to "旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}"

revision.text:
'''November 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar November}} ''November 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar November4-->きゅうれきじゅういちがつよっか）は、[[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]][[Category:友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[嘉永]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1854年]][[12月23日]]） - [[駿河湾]]を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4の嘉永大地震（[[安政東海地震]]）。死者1万人以上。[[東海道]]が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870年]][[12月25日]]） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]]、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]]と改称。
== 誕生日 == * [[文禄]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1592年]][[12月7日]]） - [[隠元隆琦]]、[[明]]の禅僧・日本[[黄檗宗]]の開祖（+ [[1673年]]） * [[文政]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1825年]][[12月13日]]） - [[有馬新七]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（+ [[1862年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[応永]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1398年]][[12月12日]]） - [[足利氏満]]、[[武将]] * [[天正]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1591年]][[12月19日]]） - [[北条氏直]]、[[小田原城|小田原城主]]（* [[1562年]]） * [[慶長]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1596年]][[12月23日]]） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]]、[[武将]]・[[伊賀国|伊賀]][[忍者]]の指導者（* [[1542年]]） * [[宝暦]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1756年]][[11月25日]]） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]]（親方出雲）、[[浄瑠璃]]作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|3|11|5|10|4|12|11|1104}}
[[Category:kk]][[en:11月4日 (旧暦)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:11月4日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar November]] {{citation needed}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] marking all the pages that are not butsumetsu so I can use process of elimination to tag all Butsumetsu pages using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

'''November 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar November}} ''November 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar November4-->きゅうれきじゅういちがつよっか）は、[[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]][[Category:友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[嘉永]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1854年]][[12月23日]]） - [[駿河湾]]を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4の嘉永大地震（[[安政東海地震]]）。死者1万人以上。[[東海道]]が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870年]][[12月25日]]） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]]、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]]と改称。
== 誕生日 == * [[文禄]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1592年]][[12月7日]]） - [[隠元隆琦]]、[[明]]の禅僧・日本[[黄檗宗]]の開祖（+ [[1673年]]） * [[文政]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1825年]][[12月13日]]） - [[有馬新七]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（+ [[1862年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[応永]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1398年]][[12月12日]]） - [[足利氏満]]、[[武将]] * [[天正]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1591年]][[12月19日]]） - [[北条氏直]]、[[小田原城|小田原城主]]（* [[1562年]]） * [[慶長]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1596年]][[12月23日]]） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]]、[[武将]]・[[伊賀国|伊賀]][[忍者]]の指導者（* [[1542年]]） * [[宝暦]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1756年]][[11月25日]]） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]]（親方出雲）、[[浄瑠璃]]作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691年]]）

'''November 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar November}} ''November 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar November4-->きゅうれきじゅういちがつよっか）は、[[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]][[Category:友引]]である。
== Events == * [[嘉永]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1854年]][[12月23日]]） - [[駿河湾]]を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4の嘉永大地震（[[安政東海地震]]）。死者1万人以上。[[東海道]]が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870年]][[12月25日]]） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]]、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]]と改称。
== Births == * [[文禄]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1592年]][[12月7日]]） - [[隠元隆琦]]、[[明]]の禅僧・日本[[黄檗宗]]の開祖（+ [[1673年]]） * [[文政]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1825年]][[12月13日]]） - [[有馬新七]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（+ [[1862年]]）
== Deaths == * [[応永]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1398年]][[12月12日]]） - [[足利氏満]]、[[武将]] * [[天正]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1591年]][[12月19日]]） - [[北条氏直]]、[[小田原城|小田原城主]]（* [[1562年]]） * [[慶長]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1596年]][[12月23日]]） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]]、[[武将]]・[[伊賀国|伊賀]][[忍者]]の指導者（* [[1542年]]） * [[宝暦]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1756年]][[11月25日]]） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]]（親方出雲）、[[浄瑠璃]]作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|3|11|5|10|4|12|11|1104}}

--> == Events == * [[嘉永]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1854年]][[12月23日]]） - [[駿河湾]]を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4の嘉永大地震（[[安政東海地震]]）。死者1万人以上。[[東海道]]が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870年]][[12月25日]]） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]]、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]]と改称。
== Births == * [[文禄]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1592年]][[12月7日]]） - [[隠元隆琦]]、[[明]]の禅僧・日本[[黄檗宗]]の開祖（+ [[1673年]]） * [[文政]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1825年]][[12月13日]]） - [[有馬新七]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（+ [[1862年]]）
== Deaths == * [[応永]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1398年]][[12月12日]]） - [[足利氏満]]、[[武将]] * [[天正]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1591年]][[12月19日]]） - [[北条氏直]]、[[小田原城|小田原城主]]（* [[1562年]]） * [[慶長]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1596年]][[12月23日]]） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]]、[[武将]]・[[伊賀国|伊賀]][[忍者]]の指導者（* [[1542年]]） * [[宝暦]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1756年]][[11月25日]]） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]]（親方出雲）、[[浄瑠璃]]作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|3|11|5|10|4|12|11|1104}}

--> == Events == * [[嘉永]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1854年]][[12月23日]]） - [[駿河湾]]を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4の嘉永大地震（[[安政東海地震]]）。死者1万人以上。[[東海道]]が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870年]][[12月25日]]） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]]、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]]と改称。
== Births == * [[文禄]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1592年]][[12月7日]]） - [[隠元隆琦]]、[[明]]の禅僧・日本[[黄檗宗]]の開祖（+ [[1673年]]） * [[文政]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1825年]][[12月13日]]） - [[有馬新七]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（+ [[1862年]]）
== Deaths == * [[応永]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1398年]][[12月12日]]） - [[足利氏満]]、[[武将]] * [[天正]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1591年]][[12月19日]]） - [[北条氏直]]、[[小田原城|小田原城主]]（* [[1562年]]） * [[慶長]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1596年]][[12月23日]]） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]]、[[武将]]・[[伊賀国|伊賀]][[忍者]]の指導者（* [[1542年]]） * [[宝暦]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1756年]][[11月25日]]） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]]（親方出雲）、[[浄瑠璃]]作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|11|3|11|5|10|4|12|11|1104}}
[[Category:kk]][[en:11月4日 (旧暦)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:11月4日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar November]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:友引]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:November 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 4 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:November 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:new pages]]

--> == Events == * [[嘉永]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1854年]][[12月23日]]） - [[駿河湾]]を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4の嘉永大地震（[[安政東海地震]]）。死者1万人以上。[[東海道]]が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870年]][[12月25日]]） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]]、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]]と改称。
== Births == * [[文禄]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1592年]][[12月7日]]） - [[隠元隆琦]]、[[明]]の禅僧・日本[[黄檗宗]]の開祖（+ [[1673年]]） * [[文政]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1825年]][[12月13日]]） - [[有馬新七]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（+ [[1862年]]）

revision.text:
[[sn:November 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]] [[zh:十一月初四]] [[en:draft:November 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 4''' は、伝統的な{{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}における11月（{{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}}）の4日目です。六曜は{{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}で、その日は{{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}です.
== Events == * {{ill|Bunmei (Japan)|ja|文明}}14年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1483|ja|1483}} {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日}}） – 室町幕府と古河公方の{{ill|Ashikaga Narushi|ja|足利成氏}}との和議が成立し、1455年以来続いていた関東地方の内乱（{{ill|Kyōtoku no Ran|ja|享徳の乱}}）が終結した。 * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}}18年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1549|ja|1549}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}}） – 三河の松平氏の領地が今川義元の支配下に入り、竹千代（後の{{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}}）が人質として駿府に派遣された。 * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}}10年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1828|ja|1828}} {{ill|January 13|ja|1月13日}}） – 徳川家斉は、息女{{ill|Yōhime|ja|溶姫}}の嫁ぎ先である加賀の前田家の敷地に、御守殿門（現在の東京大学東大赤門）を建設した。 * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855}} {{ill|January 15|ja|1月15日}}） – 嘉永から安政に改元された。 * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}}） – 太政官布達により、12月分の給与未払いが通告された.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|弘治}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1556|ja|1556}} {{ill|January 8|ja|1月8日}}） – 上杉景勝（大名、享年1623年）.
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}}） – 北条師時（鎌倉幕府10代執権、生年1275年）. * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}}） – 田沼意明（陸奥下村藩初代藩主、生年1796年）. * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}}12年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}}） – 4代目鶴屋南北（歌舞伎脚本家、生年1755年）.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127}}

[[sn:November 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]] [[zh:十一月初四]] [[en:draft:November 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 4''' は、伝統的な{{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}における11月（{{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}}）の4日目です。六曜は{{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}で、その日は{{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}です.
== Events == * {{ill|Bunmei (Japan)|ja|文明}}14年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1483|ja|1483}} {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日}}） – 室町幕府と古河公方の{{ill|Ashikaga Narushi|ja|足利成氏}}との和議が成立し、1455年以来続いていた関東地方の内乱（{{ill|Kyōtoku no Ran|ja|享徳の乱}}）が終結した。 * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}}18年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1549|ja|1549}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}}） – 三河の松平氏の領地が今川義元の支配下に入り、竹千代（後の{{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}}）が人質として駿府に派遣された。 * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}}10年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1828|ja|1828}} {{ill|January 13|ja|1月13日}}） – 徳川家斉は、息女{{ill|Yōhime|ja|溶姫}}の嫁ぎ先である加賀の前田家の敷地に、御守殿門（現在の東京大学東大赤門）を建設した。 * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855}} {{ill|January 15|ja|1月15日}}） – 嘉永から安政に改元された。 * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}}） – 太政官布達により、12月分の給与未払いが通告された.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|弘治}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1556|ja|1556}} {{ill|January 8|ja|1月8日}}） – 上杉景勝（大名、享年1623年）.
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}}） – 北条師時（鎌倉幕府10代執権、生年1275年）. * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}}） – 田沼意明（陸奥下村藩初代藩主、生年1796年）. * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}}12年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}}） – 4代目鶴屋南北（歌舞伎脚本家、生年1755年）.

[[sn:November 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]] [[zh:十一月初四]] [[en:draft:November 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[嘉永]]7年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1854]][[12月23日]]） - [[駿河湾]]を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4の嘉永大地震（[[安政東海地震]]）。死者1万人以上。[[東海道]]が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[明治]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1870]][[12月25日]]） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]]、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]]と改称。
== Births == * [[文禄]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1592]][[12月7日]]） - [[隠元隆琦]]、[[明]]の禅僧・日本[[黄檗宗]]の開祖（+ [[1673]]） * [[文政]]8th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1825]][[12月13日]]） - [[有馬新七]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（+ [[1862]]）
== Deaths == * [[応永]]5年（[[Julian Calendar]][[1398]][[12月12日]]） - [[足利氏満]]、[[武将]] * [[天正]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1591]][[12月19日]]） - [[北条氏直]]、[[小田原城|小田原城主]]（* [[1562]]） * [[慶長]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1596]][[12月23日]]） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]]、[[武将]]・[[伊賀国|伊賀]][[忍者]]の指導者（* [[1542]]） * [[宝暦]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1756]][[11月25日]]） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]]（親方出雲）、[[浄瑠璃]]作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691]]）

[[sn:November 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]] [[zh:十一月初四]] [[en:draft:November 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[嘉永]]7th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1854]][[12月23日]]） - [[駿河湾]]を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4の嘉永大地震（[[安政東海地震]]）。死者1万人以上。[[東海道]]が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[明治]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1870]][[12月25日]]） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]]、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]]と改称。
== Births == * [[文禄]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1592]][[12月7日]]） - [[隠元隆琦]]、[[明]]の禅僧・日本[[黄檗宗]]の開祖（+ [[1673]]） * [[文政]]8th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1825]][[12月13日]]） - [[有馬新七]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（+ [[1862]]）
== Deaths == * [[応永]]5th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1398]][[12月12日]]） - [[足利氏満]]、[[武将]] * [[天正]]19th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1591]][[12月19日]]） - [[北条氏直]]、[[小田原城|小田原城主]]（* [[1562]]） * [[慶長]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1596]][[12月23日]]） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]]、[[武将]]・[[伊賀国|伊賀]][[忍者]]の指導者（* [[1542]]） * [[宝暦]]6th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1756]][[11月25日]]） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]]（親方出雲）、[[浄瑠璃]]作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691]]）

== Events == * [[嘉永]]7th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1854]][[12月23日]]） - [[駿河湾]]を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4の嘉永大地震（[[安政東海地震]]）。死者1万人以上。[[東海道]]が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[明治]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1870]][[12月25日]]） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]]、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]]と改称。
== Births == * [[文禄]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1592]][[12月7日]]） - [[隠元隆琦]]、[[明]]の禅僧・日本[[黄檗宗]]の開祖（+ [[1673]]） * [[文政]]8th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1825]][[12月13日]]） - [[有馬新七]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（+ [[1862]]）
== Deaths == * [[応永]]5th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1398]][[12月12日]]） - [[足利氏満]]、[[武将]] * [[天正]]19th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1591]][[12月19日]]） - [[北条氏直]]、[[小田原城|小田原城主]]（* [[1562]]） * [[慶長]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1596]][[12月23日]]） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]]、[[武将]]・[[伊賀国|伊賀]][[忍者]]の指導者（* [[1542]]） * [[宝暦]]6th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1756]][[11月25日]]） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]]（親方出雲）、[[浄瑠璃]]作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691]]）

== Deaths == * [[応永]]5th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1398]][[12月12日]]） - [[足利氏満]]、[[武将]] * [[天正]]19th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1591]][[12月19日]]） - [[北条氏直]]、[[小田原城|小田原城主]]（* [[1562]]） * [[慶長]]1st year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1596]][[12月23日]]） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]]、[[武将]]・[[伊賀国|伊賀]][[忍者]]の指導者（* [[1542]]） * [[Hōreki]]6th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1756]][[11月25日]]） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]]（親方出雲）、[[浄瑠璃]]作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691]]）

== Events == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1854]] [[December 23]] ） - [[駿河湾]] を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]] 8.4の嘉永大地震（[[安政東海地震]] ）。死者1万人以上。[[東海道]] が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[December 25]] ） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]] 、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]] と改称。
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[December 7]] ） - [[隠元隆琦]] 、[[明]] の禅僧・日本[[黄檗宗]] の開祖（+ [[1673]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1825]] [[December 13]] ） - [[有馬新七]] 、[[尊攘派]] 志士（+ [[1862]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Ōei]] 5th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1398]] [[December 12]] ） - [[足利氏満]] 、[[武将]] * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 19th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1591]] [[December 19]] ） - [[北条氏直]] 、[[小田原城|小田原城主]] （* [[1562]] ） * [[Keichō]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1596]] [[December 23]] ） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]] 、[[武将]] ・[[伊賀国|伊賀]] [[忍者]] の指導者（* [[1542]] ） * [[Hōreki]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1756]] [[November 25]] ） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]] （親方出雲）、[[浄瑠璃]] 作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691]] ）

[[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]] [[zh:十一月初四]] [[en:draft:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1854]] [[December 23]] ） - [[駿河湾]] を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]] 8.4の嘉永大地震（[[安政東海地震]] ）。死者1万人以上。[[東海道]] が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[December 25]] ） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]] 、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]] と改称。
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[December 7]] ） - [[隠元隆琦]] 、[[明]] の禅僧・日本[[黄檗宗]] の開祖（+ [[1673]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1825]] [[December 13]] ） - [[有馬新七]] 、[[尊攘派]] 志士（+ [[1862]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Ōei]] 5th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1398]] [[December 12]] ） - [[足利氏満]] 、[[武将]] * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 19th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1591]] [[December 19]] ） - [[北条氏直]] 、[[小田原城|小田原城主]] （* [[1562]] ） * [[Keichō]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1596]] [[December 23]] ） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]] 、[[武将]] ・[[伊賀国|伊賀]] [[忍者]] の指導者（* [[1542]] ） * [[Hōreki]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1756]] [[November 25]] ） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]] （親方出雲）、[[浄瑠璃]] 作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691]] ）

[[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]] [[zh:十一月初四]] [[en:draft:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1854]] [[December 23]] ） - [[駿河湾]] を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]] 8.4の嘉永大Earthquake（[[安政東海Earthquake]] ）。死者1万人以上。[[東海道]] が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[December 25]] ） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]] 、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]] と改称。
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[December 7]] ） - [[隠元隆琦]] 、[[明]] の禅Monk・日本[[黄檗宗]] の開祖（+ [[1673]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1825]] [[December 13]] ） - [[有馬新七]] 、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（+ [[1862]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Ōei]] 5th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1398]] [[December 12]] ） - [[足利氏満]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 19th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1591]] [[December 19]] ） - [[北条氏直]] 、[[小田原城|小田原城主]] （* [[1562]] ） * [[Keichō]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1596]] [[December 23]] ） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[伊賀国|伊賀]] [[忍者]] の指導者（* [[1542]] ） * [[Hōreki]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1756]] [[November 25]] ） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]] （親方出雲）、[[Joruri]] 作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691]] ）
== See Also ==

[[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]] [[zh:十一月初四]] [[en:draft:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1854]] [[December 23]] ） - [[駿河湾]] を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]] 8.4の嘉永大Earthquake（[[安政東海Earthquake]] ）。死者1万人以上。[[Tōkaidō (region)|Tōkaidō]] が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[December 25]] ） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]] 、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]] と改称。
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[December 7]] ） - [[隠元隆琦]] 、[[明]] の禅Monk・日本[[黄檗宗]] の開祖（+ [[1673]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1825]] [[December 13]] ） - [[有馬新七]] 、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（+ [[1862]] ）

== Events == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1854]] [[December 23]] ） - [[駿河湾]] を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]] 8.4の嘉永大Earthquake（[[安政東海Earthquake]] ）。死者1万人以上。[[Tōkaidō (region)|Tōkaidō]] が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[December 25]] ） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]] 、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]] と改称。
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[December 7]] ） - [[隠元隆琦]] 、[[明]] の禅Monk・日本[[黄檗宗]] の開祖（+ [[1673]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1825]] [[December 13]] ） - [[有馬新七]] 、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（+ [[1862]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Ōei]] 5th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1398]] [[December 12]] ） - [[足利氏満]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 19th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1591]] [[December 19]] ） - [[北条氏直]] 、[[小田原城|小田原城主]] （* [[1562]] ） * [[Keichō]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1596]] [[December 23]] ） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[伊賀国|伊賀]] [[忍者]] の指導者（* [[1542]] ） * [[Hōreki]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1756]] [[November 25]] ） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]] （親方出雲）、[[Joruri]] 作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691]] ）

[[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]] [[zh:十一月初四]] [[en:draft:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1854]] [[December 23]] ） - [[駿河湾]] を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]] 8.4の嘉永大Earthquake（[[安政東海Earthquake]] ）。死者1万人以上。[[Tōkaidō (region)|Tōkaidō]] が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[December 25]] ） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]] 、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]] と改称。
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[December 7]] ） - [[隠元隆琦]] 、[[明]] の禅Monk・日本[[黄檗宗]] の開祖（+ [[1673]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1825]] [[December 13]] ） - [[有馬新七]] 、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（+ [[1862]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Ōei]] 5th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1398]] [[December 12]] ） - [[足利氏満]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 19th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1591]] [[December 19]] ） - [[北条氏直]] 、[[小田原城|小田原城主]] （* [[1562]] ） * [[Keichō]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1596]] [[December 23]] ） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[伊賀国|伊賀]] [[忍者]] の指導者（* [[1542]] ） * [[Hōreki]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1756]] [[November 25]] ） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]] （親方出雲）、[[Joruri]] 作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|3|11|5|10|4|12|11|1104}}

[[Category:New]] [[sn:ovember 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:New]] [[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]]

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1854]] [[December 23]] ） - [[駿河湾]] を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]] 8.4の嘉永大Earthquake（[[安政東海Earthquake]] ）。死者1万人以上。[[Tōkaidō (region)|Tōkaidō]] が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[December 25]] ） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]] 、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]] と改称。
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[December 7]] ） - [[隠元隆琦]] 、[[明]] の禅Monk・日本[[黄檗宗]] の開祖（+ [[1673]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1825]] [[December 13]] ） - [[有馬新七]] 、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（+ [[1862]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Ōei]] 5th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1398]] [[December 12]] ） - [[足利氏満]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 19th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1591]] [[December 19]] ） - [[北条氏直]] 、[[小田原城|小田原城主]] （* [[1562]] ） * [[Keichō]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1596]] [[December 23]] ） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[伊賀国|伊賀]] [[忍者]] の指導者（* [[1542]] ） * [[Hōreki]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1756]] [[November 25]] ） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]] （親方出雲）、[[Joruri]] 作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]] [[zh:十一月初四]] [[en:draft:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1854]] [[December 23]] ） - [[駿河湾]] を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]] 8.4の嘉永大Earthquake（[[安政東海Earthquake]] ）。死者1万人以上。[[Tōkaidō (region)|Tōkaidō]] が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[December 25]] ） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]] 、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]] と改称。
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[December 7]] ） - [[隠元隆琦]] 、[[明]] の禅Monk・日本[[黄檗宗]] の開祖（+ [[1673]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1825]] [[December 13]] ） - [[有馬新七]] 、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（+ [[1862]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Ōei]] 5th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1398]] [[December 12]] ） - [[足利氏満]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 19th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1591]] [[December 19]] ） - [[北条氏直]] 、[[小田原城|小田原城主]] （* [[1562]] ） * [[Keichō]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1596]] [[December 23]] ） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[伊賀国|伊賀]] [[忍者]] の指導者（* [[1542]] ） * [[Hōreki]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1756]] [[November 25]] ） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]] （親方出雲）、[[Joruri]] 作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|3|11|5|10|4|12|11|1104}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1854]] [[December 23]] ） - [[駿河湾]] を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]] 8.4の嘉永大Earthquake（[[安政東海Earthquake]] ）。死者1万人以上。[[Tōkaidō (region)|Tōkaidō]] が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[December 25]] ） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]] 、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]] と改称。
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[December 7]] ） - [[隠元隆琦]] 、[[明]] の禅Monk・日本[[黄檗宗]] の開祖（+ [[1673]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1825]] [[December 13]] ） - [[有馬新七]] 、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（+ [[1862]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Ōei]] 5th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1398]] [[December 12]] ） - [[足利氏満]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 19th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1591]] [[December 19]] ） - [[北条氏直]] 、[[小田原城|小田原城主]] （* [[1562]] ） * [[Keichō]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1596]] [[December 23]] ） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[伊賀国|伊賀]] [[忍者]] の指導者（* [[1542]] ） * [[Hōreki]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1756]] [[November 25]] ） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]] （親方出雲）、[[Joruri]] 作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|3|11|5|10|4|12|11|1104}}

revision.text:
[[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]] [[zh:十一月初四]] [[en:draft:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1854]] [[December 23]] ） - [[駿河湾]] を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]] 8.4の嘉永大Earthquake（[[安政東海Earthquake]] ）。死者1万人以上。[[Tōkaidō (region)|Tōkaidō]] が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[December 25]] ） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]] 、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]] と改称。
== Births == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[December 7]] ） - [[隠元隆琦]] 、[[明]] の禅Monk・日本[[黄檗宗]] の開祖（+ [[1673]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1825]] [[December 13]] ） - [[有馬新七]] 、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（+ [[1862]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Ōei]] 5th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1398]] [[December 12]] ） - [[足利氏満]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 19th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1591]] [[December 19]] ） - [[北条氏直]] 、[[小田原城|小田原城主]] （* [[1562]] ） * [[Keichō]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1596]] [[December 23]] ） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[伊賀国|伊賀]] [[忍者]] の指導者（* [[1542]] ） * [[Hōreki]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1756]] [[November 25]] ） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]] （親方出雲）、[[Joruri]] 作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|3|11|5|10|4|12|11|1104}}

[[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]] [[zh:十一月初四]] [[en:draft:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * In the 7th year of the Kaei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] – December 23): An 8.4-magnitude earthquake—the Kaei Great Earthquake (also known as the Ansei Tōkai Earthquake)—occurred with its epicenter in Suruga Bay. More than 10,000 people died, and the Tōkaidō region was cut off. A Russian warship, the Diana, anchored at Shimoda, was severely damaged by a tsunami. * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1870]] – December 25): The Tokyo Naval Depot was renamed the Naval Academy, and the Osaka Depot was renamed the Army Academy.
== Births == * In the 1st year of the Bunroku era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1592]] – December 7): Hidegen Takayuki, a Zen monk of the Ming dynasty and the founder of the Japanese Ōbaku school, was born (died 1673). * In the 8th year of the Bunsei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1825]] – December 13): Arima Shinshichi, a proponent of the Sonnō jōi movement, was born (died 1862).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Ōei era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1398]] – December 12): Ashikaga Ujimasa, a military commander, died. * In the 19th year of the Tenshō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1591]] – December 19): Hojo Ujinao, lord of Odawara Castle, died (born 1562). * In the 1st year of the Keichō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1596]] – December 23): Hattori Masanari (also known as Hattori Hanzō (Masanari)), a military commander and ninja master from Iga, died (born 1542). * In the 6th year of the Hōreki era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1756]] – November 25): The second-generation head of Takeda Izumo, known as Zabon Takeda Izumo (Oyakata Izumo), a Joruri playwright and head of the Osaka Takeda Izumo theater, died (born 1691).

[[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]] [[zh:十一月初四]] [[en:draft:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * In the 7th year of the Kaei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] – December 23): An 8.4-magnitude earthquake—the Kaei Great Earthquake (also known as the Ansei Tōkai Earthquake)—occurred with its epicenter in Suruga Bay. More than 10,000 people died, and the Tōkaidō region was cut off. A Russian warship, the Diana, anchored at Shimoda, was severely damaged by a tsunami. * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1870]] – December 25): The Tokyo Naval Depot was renamed the Naval Academy, and the Osaka Depot was renamed the Army Academy.
== Births == * In the 1st year of the Bunroku era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1592]] – December 7): Hidegen Takayuki, a Zen monk of the Ming dynasty and the founder of the Japanese Ōbaku school, was born (died 1673). * In the 8th year of the Bunsei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1825]] – December 13): Arima Shinshichi, a proponent of the Sonnō jōi movement, was born (died 1862).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Ōei era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1398]] – December 12): Ashikaga Ujimasa, a military commander, died. * In the 19th year of the Tenshō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1591]] – December 19): Hojo Ujinao, lord of Odawara Castle, died (born 1562). * In the 1st year of the Keichō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1596]] – December 23): Hattori Masanari (also known as Hattori Hanzō (Masanari)), a military commander and ninja master from Iga, died (born 1542). * In the 6th year of the Hōreki era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1756]] – November 25): The second-generation head of Takeda Izumo, known as Zabon Takeda Izumo (Oyakata Izumo), a Joruri playwright and head of the Osaka Takeda Izumo theater, died (born 1691).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|3|11|5|10|4|12|11|1104}}

[[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]] [[zh:十一月初四]] [[en:draft:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * In the 7th year of the Kaei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] – December 23): An 8.4-magnitude earthquake—the Kaei Great Earthquake (also known as the Ansei Tōkai Earthquake)—occurred with its epicenter in Suruga Bay. More than 10,000 people died, and the Tōkaidō region was cut off. A Russian warship, the Diana, anchored at Shimoda, was severely damaged by a tsunami. * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1870]] – December 25): The Tokyo Naval Depot was renamed the Naval Academy, and the Osaka Depot was renamed the Army Academy.
== Births == * In the 1st year of the Bunroku era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1592]] – December 7): Hidegen Takayuki, a Zen monk of the Ming dynasty and the founder of the Japanese Ōbaku school, was born (died 1673). * In the 8th year of the Bunsei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1825]] – December 13): Arima Shinshichi, a proponent of the Sonnō jōi movement, was born (died 1862).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Ōei era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1398]] – December 12): Ashikaga Ujimasa, a military commander, died. * In the 19th year of the Tenshō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1591]] – December 19): Hojo Ujinao, lord of Odawara Castle, died (born 1562). * In the 1st year of the Keichō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1596]] – December 23): Hattori Masanari (also known as Hattori Hanzō (Masanari)), a military commander and ninja master from Iga, died (born 1542). * In the 6th year of the Hōreki era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1756]] – November 25): The second-generation head of Takeda Izumo, known as Zabon Takeda Izumo (Oyakata Izumo), a Joruri playwright and head of the Osaka Takeda Izumo theater, died (born 1691).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|3|11|5|10|4|12|11|1104}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft}} .
== Events == * In the 7th year of the Kaei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1854]] – December 23): An 8.4-magnitude earthquake—the Kaei Great Earthquake (also known as the Ansei Tōkai Earthquake)—occurred with its epicenter in Suruga Bay. More than 10,000 people died, and the Tōkaidō region was cut off. A Russian warship, the Diana, anchored at Shimoda, was severely damaged by a tsunami. * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1870]] – December 25): The Tokyo Naval Depot was renamed the Naval Academy, and the Osaka Depot was renamed the Army Academy.
== Births == * In the 1st year of the Bunroku era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1592]] – December 7): Hidegen Takayuki, a Zen monk of the Ming dynasty and the founder of the Japanese Ōbaku school, was born (died 1673). * In the 8th year of the Bunsei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1825]] – December 13): Arima Shinshichi, a proponent of the Sonnō jōi movement, was born (died 1862).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Ōei era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1398]] – December 12): Ashikaga Ujimasa, a military commander, died. * In the 19th year of the Tenshō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1591]] – December 19): Hojo Ujinao, lord of Odawara Castle, died (born 1562). * In the 1st year of the Keichō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1596]] – December 23): Hattori Masanari (also known as Hattori Hanzō (Masanari)), a military commander and ninja master from Iga, died (born 1542). * In the 6th year of the Hōreki era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1756]] – November 25): The second-generation head of Takeda Izumo, known as Zabon Takeda Izumo (Oyakata Izumo), a Joruri playwright and head of the Osaka Takeda Izumo theater, died (born 1691).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|3|11|5|10|4|12|11|1104}}
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]]

24 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:11月4日 (旧暦) up to rev 88169916
revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月4日'''（きゅうれきじゅういちがつよっか）は、[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[嘉永]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1854年]][[12月23日]]） - [[駿河湾]]を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4の嘉永大地震（[[安政東海地震]]）。死者1万人以上。[[東海道]]が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870年]][[12月25日]]） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]]、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]]と改称。
== 誕生日 == * [[文禄]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1592年]][[12月7日]]） - [[隠元隆琦]]、[[明]]の禅僧・日本[[黄檗宗]]の開祖（+ [[1673年]]） * [[文政]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1825年]][[12月13日]]） - [[有馬新七]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（+ [[1862年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[応永]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1398年]][[12月12日]]） - [[足利氏満]]、[[武将]] * [[天正]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1591年]][[12月19日]]） - [[北条氏直]]、[[小田原城|小田原城主]]（* [[1562年]]） * [[慶長]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1596年]][[12月23日]]） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]]、[[武将]]・[[伊賀国|伊賀]][[忍者]]の指導者（* [[1542年]]） * [[宝暦]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1756年]][[11月25日]]） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]]（親方出雲）、[[浄瑠璃]]作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|3|11|5|10|4|12|11|1104}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[11月4日 (旧暦)]] to [[November 4 (Lunisolar)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月4日'''（きゅうれきじゅういちがつよっか）は、[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[嘉永]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1854年]][[12月23日]]） - [[駿河湾]]を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]]8.4の嘉永大地震（[[安政東海地震]]）。死者1万人以上。[[東海道]]が断絶。伊豆下田に碇泊中のロシア艦ディアナ号が津波で大破した。 * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870年]][[12月25日]]） - 東京海軍所を[[海軍兵学校 (日本)|海軍兵学寮]]、大坂兵学寮を[[陸軍士官学校 (日本)|陸軍兵学寮]]と改称。
== 誕生日 == * [[文禄]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1592年]][[12月7日]]） - [[隠元隆琦]]、[[明]]の禅僧・日本[[黄檗宗]]の開祖（+ [[1673年]]） * [[文政]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1825年]][[12月13日]]） - [[有馬新七]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（+ [[1862年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[応永]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1398年]][[12月12日]]） - [[足利氏満]]、[[武将]] * [[天正]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1591年]][[12月19日]]） - [[北条氏直]]、[[小田原城|小田原城主]]（* [[1562年]]） * [[慶長]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1596年]][[12月23日]]） - [[服部正成|服部半蔵(正成)]]、[[武将]]・[[伊賀国|伊賀]][[忍者]]の指導者（* [[1542年]]） * [[宝暦]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1756年]][[11月25日]]） - [[竹田出雲|座本2代目竹田出雲]]（親方出雲）、[[浄瑠璃]]作者・大坂竹本座座本（* [[1691年]]）

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|November 4|qq=November 4}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=}} .
== Events == * In the 7th year of the Kaei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1854]] – December 23): An 8.4-magnitude earthquake—the Kaei Great Earthquake (also known as the Ansei Tōkai Earthquake)—occurred with its epicenter in Suruga Bay. More than 10,000 people died, and the Tōkaidō region was cut off. A Russian warship, the Diana, anchored at Shimoda, was severely damaged by a tsunami. * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] – December 25): The Tokyo Naval Depot was renamed the Naval Academy, and the Osaka Depot was renamed the Army Academy.
== Births == * In the 1st year of the Bunroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] – December 7): Hidegen Takayuki, a Zen monk of the Ming dynasty and the founder of the Japanese Ōbaku school, was born (died 1673). * In the 8th year of the Bunsei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1825]] – December 13): Arima Shinshichi, a proponent of the Sonnō jōi movement, was born (died 1862).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Ōei era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[1398]] – December 12): Ashikaga Ujimasa, a military commander, died. * In the 19th year of the Tenshō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1591]] – December 19): Hojo Ujinao, lord of Odawara Castle, died (born 1562). * In the 1st year of the Keichō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1596]] – December 23): Hattori Masanari (also known as Hattori Hanzō (Masanari)), a military commander and ninja master from Iga, died (born 1542). * In the 6th year of the Hōreki era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1756]] – November 25): The second-generation head of Takeda Izumo, known as Zabon Takeda Izumo (Oyakata Izumo), a Joruri playwright and head of the Osaka Takeda Izumo theater, died (born 1691).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|3|11|5|10|4|12|11|1104|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]]
{{translated page|ja|11月4日 (旧暦)|version=88169916|comment=Imported full ja history}}

== Events == * In the 7th year of the Kaei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1854]] – December 23): An 8.4-magnitude earthquake—the Kaei Great Earthquake (also known as the Ansei Tōkai Earthquake)—occurred with its epicenter in Suruga Bay. More than 10,000 people died, and the Tōkaidō region was cut off. A Russian warship, the Diana, anchored at Shimoda, was severely damaged by a tsunami. * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] – December 25): The Tokyo Naval Depot was renamed the Naval Academy, and the Osaka Depot was renamed the Army Academy.

== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Ōei era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[1398]] – December 12): Ashikaga Ujimasa, a military commander, died. * In the 19th year of the Tenshō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1591]] – December 19): Hojo Ujinao, lord of Odawara Castle, died (born 1562). * In the 1st year of the Keichō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1596]] – December 23): Hattori Masanari (also known as Hattori Hanzō (Masanari)), a military commander and ninja master from Iga, died (born 1542). * In the 6th year of the Hōreki era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1756]] – November 25): The second-generation head of Takeda Izumo, known as Zabon Takeda Izumo (Oyakata Izumo), a Joruri playwright and head of the Osaka Takeda Izumo theater, died (born 1691).
== See Also ==

{{Not to be confused with|November 4|qq=November 4}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
== Events == * In the 7th year of the Kaei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1854]] – December 23): An 8.4-magnitude earthquake—the Kaei Great Earthquake (also known as the Ansei Tōkai Earthquake)—occurred with its epicenter in Suruga Bay. More than 10,000 people died, and the Tōkaidō region was cut off. A Russian warship, the Diana, anchored at Shimoda, was severely damaged by a tsunami. * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] – December 25): The Tokyo Naval Depot was renamed the Naval Academy, and the Osaka Depot was renamed the Army Academy.
== Births == * In the 1st year of the Bunroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] – December 7): Hidegen Takayuki, a Zen monk of the Ming dynasty and the founder of the Japanese Ōbaku school, was born (died 1673). * In the 8th year of the Bunsei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1825]] – December 13): Arima Shinshichi, a proponent of the Sonnō jōi movement, was born (died 1862).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Ōei era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1398|1398]] – December 12): Ashikaga Ujimasa, a military commander, died. * In the 19th year of the Tenshō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1591]] – December 19): Hojo Ujinao, lord of Odawara Castle, died (born 1562). * In the 1st year of the Keichō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1596]] – December 23): Hattori Masanari (also known as Hattori Hanzō (Masanari)), a military commander and ninja master from Iga, died (born 1542). * In the 6th year of the Hōreki era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1756]] – November 25): The second-generation head of Takeda Izumo, known as Zabon Takeda Izumo (Oyakata Izumo), a Joruri playwright and head of the Osaka Takeda Izumo theater, died (born 1691).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|3|11|5|10|4|12|11|1104|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]]
{{translated page|ja|11月4日 (旧暦)|version=88169916|comment=Imported full ja history}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 7]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar November]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]][[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Tomobiki]] [[Category:Days 4 of Japanese Lunar months]] }}
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 4일]] [[ja:11月4日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十一月初四]]
[[sn:ovember 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ar:November 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:Days]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初四]]

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
== Events == * In the 7th year of the Kaei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1854]] – December 23): An 8.4-magnitude earthquake—the Kaei Great Earthquake (also known as the Ansei Tōkai Earthquake)—occurred with its epicenter in Suruga Bay. More than 10,000 people died, and the Tōkaidō region was cut off. == Births == * In the 1st year of the Bunroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] – December 7): Hidegen Takayuki, a Zen monk of the Ming dynasty and the founder of the Japanese Ōbaku school, was born (died 1673). * In the 8th year of the Bunsei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1825]] – December 13): Arima Shinshichi, a proponent of the Sonnō jōi movement, was born (died 1862).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Ōei era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1398|1398]] – December 12): Ashikaga Ujimasa, a military commander, died. * In the 19th year of the Tenshō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1591|1591]] – December 19): Hojo Ujinao, lord of Odawara Castle, died (born 1562). * In the 1st year of the Keichō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1596]] – December 23): Hattori Masanari (also known as Hattori Hanzō (Masanari)), a military commander and ninja master from Iga, died (born 1542). * In the 6th year of the Hōreki era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1756]] – November 25): The second-generation head of Takeda Izumo, known as Zabon Takeda Izumo (Oyakata Izumo), a Joruri playwright and head of the Osaka Takeda Izumo theater, died (born 1691).
== See Also ==

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
== Events == * In the 7th year of the Kaei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1854]] – December 23): An 8.4-magnitude earthquake—the Kaei Great Earthquake (also known as the Ansei Tōkai Earthquake)—occurred with its epicenter in Suruga Bay. More than 10,000 people died, and the Tōkaidō region was cut off. A Russian warship, the Diana, anchored at Shimoda, was severely damaged by a tsunami. * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] – December 25): The Tokyo Naval Depot was renamed the Naval Academy, and the Osaka Depot was renamed the Army Academy.
== Births == * In the 1st year of the Bunroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1592|1592]] – December 7): Hidegen Takayuki, a Zen monk of the Ming dynasty and the founder of the Japanese Ōbaku school, was born (died 1673). * In the 8th year of the Bunsei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] – December 13): Arima Shinshichi, a proponent of the Sonnō jōi movement, was born (died 1862).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Ōei era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1398|1398]] – December 12): Ashikaga Ujimasa, a military commander, died. * In the 19th year of the Tenshō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1591|1591]] – December 19): Hojo Ujinao, lord of Odawara Castle, died (born 1562). * In the 1st year of the Keichō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] – December 23): Hattori Masanari (also known as Hattori Hanzō (Masanari)), a military commander and ninja master from Iga, died (born 1542). * In the 6th year of the Hōreki era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1756|1756]] – November 25): The second-generation head of Takeda Izumo, known as Zabon Takeda Izumo (Oyakata Izumo), a Joruri playwright and head of the Osaka Takeda Izumo theater, died (born 1691).
== See Also ==

{{translated page|ja|11月4日 (旧暦)|version=88169916|comment=Imported full ja history}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . == Events == * In the 7th year of the Kaei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] – December 23): An 8.4-magnitude earthquake—the Kaei Great Earthquake (also known as the Ansei Tōkai Earthquake)—occurred with its epicenter in Suruga Bay. More than 10,000 people died, and the Tōkaidō region was cut off. A Russian warship, the Diana, anchored at Shimoda, was severely damaged by a tsunami. * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] – December 25): The Tokyo Naval Depot was renamed the Naval Academy, and the Osaka Depot was renamed the Army Academy.
== Births == * In the 1st year of the Bunroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1592|1592]] – December 7): Hidegen Takayuki, a Zen monk of the Ming dynasty and the founder of the Japanese Ōbaku school, was born (died 1673). * In the 8th year of the Bunsei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] – December 13): Arima Shinshichi, a proponent of the Sonnō jōi movement, was born (died 1862).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Ōei era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1398|1398]] – December 12): Ashikaga Ujimasa, a military commander, died. * In the 19th year of the Tenshō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1591|1591]] – December 19): Hojo Ujinao, lord of Odawara Castle, died (born 1562). * In the 1st year of the Keichō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] – December 23): Hattori Masanari (also known as Hattori Hanzō (Masanari)), a military commander and ninja master from Iga, died (born 1542). * In the 6th year of the Hōreki era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1756|1756]] – November 25): The second-generation head of Takeda Izumo, known as Zabon Takeda Izumo (Oyakata Izumo), a Joruri playwright and head of the Osaka Takeda Izumo theater, died (born 1691).

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840046]] Wikidata name: 4th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 4|qq=November 4}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . More than 10,000 people died, and the Tōkaidō region was cut off. A Russian warship, the Diana, anchored at Shimoda, was severely damaged by a tsunami. * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] – December 25): The Tokyo Naval Depot was renamed the Naval Academy, and the Osaka Depot was renamed the Army Academy.

== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Ōei era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1398|1398]] – December 12): Ashikaga Ujimasa, a military commander, died. * In the 19th year of the Tenshō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1591|1591]] – December 19): Hojo Ujinao, lord of Odawara Castle, died (born 1562). * In the 1st year of the Keichō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] – December 23): Hattori Masanari (also known as Hattori Hanzō (Masanari)), a military commander and ninja master from Iga, died (born 1542). * In the 6th year of the Hōreki era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1756|1756]] – November 25): The second-generation head of Takeda Izumo, known as Zabon Takeda Izumo (Oyakata Izumo), a Joruri playwright and head of the Osaka Takeda Izumo theater, died (born 1691).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * In the 7th year of the Kaei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] – December 23): An 8.4-magnitude earthquake—the Kaei Great Earthquake (also known as the Ansei Tōkai Earthquake)—occurred with its epicenter in Suruga Bay. More than 10,000 people died, and the Tōkaidō region was cut off. A Russian warship, the Diana, anchored at Shimoda, was severely damaged by a tsunami. * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] – December 25): The Tokyo Naval Depot was renamed the Naval Academy, and the Osaka Depot was renamed the Army Academy.
== Births == * In the 1st year of the Bunroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1592|1592]] – December 7): Hidegen Takayuki, a Zen monk of the Ming dynasty and the founder of the Japanese Ōbaku school, was born (died 1673). * In the 8th year of the Bunsei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] – December 13): Arima Shinshichi, a proponent of the Sonnō jōi movement, was born (died 1862).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Ōei era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1398|1398]] – December 12): Ashikaga Ujimasa, a military commander, died. * In the 19th year of the Tenshō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1591|1591]] – December 19): Hojo Ujinao, lord of Odawara Castle, died (born 1562). * In the 1st year of the Keichō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] – December 23): Hattori Masanari (also known as Hattori Hanzō (Masanari)), a military commander and ninja master from Iga, died (born 1542). * In the 6th year of the Hōreki era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1756|1756]] – November 25): The second-generation head of Takeda Izumo, known as Zabon Takeda Izumo (Oyakata Izumo), a Joruri playwright and head of the Osaka Takeda Izumo theater, died (born 1691).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * In the 7th year of the Kaei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] – December 23): An 8.4-magnitude earthquake—the Kaei Great Earthquake (also known as the Ansei Tōkai Earthquake)—occurred with its epicenter in Suruga Bay. More than 10,000 people died, and the Tōkaidō region was cut off. A Russian warship, the Diana, anchored at Shimoda, was severely damaged by a tsunami. * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] – December 25): The Tokyo Naval Depot was renamed the Naval Academy, and the Osaka Depot was renamed the Army Academy.
== Births == * In the 1st year of the Bunroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1592|1592]] – December 7): Hidegen Takayuki, a Zen monk of the Ming dynasty and the founder of the Japanese Ōbaku school, was born (died 1673). * In the 8th year of the Bunsei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] – December 13): Arima Shinshichi, a proponent of the Sonnō jōi movement, was born (died 1862).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Ōei era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1398|1398]] – December 12): Ashikaga Ujimasa, a military commander, died. * In the 19th year of the Tenshō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1591|1591]] – December 19): Hojo Ujinao, lord of Odawara Castle, died (born 1562). * In the 1st year of the Keichō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] – December 23): Hattori Masanari (also known as Hattori Hanzō (Masanari)), a military commander and ninja master from Iga, died (born 1542). * In the 6th year of the Hōreki era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1756|1756]] – November 25): The second-generation head of Takeda Izumo, known as Zabon Takeda Izumo (Oyakata Izumo), a Joruri playwright and head of the Osaka Takeda Izumo theater, died (born 1691).
== See Also ==

== Events == * In the 7th year of the Kaei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] – December 23): An 8.4-magnitude earthquake—the Kaei Great Earthquake (also known as the Ansei Tōkai Earthquake)—occurred with its epicenter in Suruga Bay. More than 10,000 people died, and the Tōkaidō region was cut off. A Russian warship, the Diana, anchored at Shimoda, was severely damaged by a tsunami. * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] – December 25): The Tokyo Naval Depot was renamed the Naval Academy, and the Osaka Depot was renamed the Army Academy.
== Births == * In the 1st year of the Bunroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1592|1592]] – December 7): Hidegen Takayuki, a Zen monk of the Ming dynasty and the founder of the Japanese Ōbaku school, was born (died 1673). * In the 8th year of the Bunsei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] – December 13): Arima Shinshichi, a proponent of the Sonnō jōi movement, was born (died 1862).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Ōei era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1398|1398]] – December 12): Ashikaga Ujimasa, a military commander, died. * In the 19th year of the Tenshō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1591|1591]] – December 19): Hojo Ujinao, lord of Odawara Castle, died (born 1562). * In the 1st year of the Keichō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1596|1596]] – December 23): Hattori Masanari (also known as Hattori Hanzō (Masanari)), a military commander and ninja master from Iga, died (born 1542). * In the 6th year of the Hōreki era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1756|1756]] – November 25): The second-generation head of Takeda Izumo, known as Zabon Takeda Izumo (Oyakata Izumo), a Joruri playwright and head of the Osaka Takeda Izumo theater, died (born 1691).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * In the 7th year of the Kaei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1854|en|1854|WD=Q7670|lt=1854}} – December 23): An 8.4-magnitude earthquake—the Kaei Great Earthquake (also known as the Ansei Tōkai Earthquake)—occurred with its epicenter in Suruga Bay. More than 10,000 people died, and the Tōkaidō region was cut off. A Russian warship, the Diana, anchored at Shimoda, was severely damaged by a tsunami. * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} – December 25): The Tokyo Naval Depot was renamed the Naval Academy, and the Osaka Depot was renamed the Army Academy.
== Births == * In the 1st year of the Bunroku era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1592|en|1592|WD=Q6769|lt=1592}} – December 7): Hidegen Takayuki, a Zen monk of the Ming dynasty and the founder of the Japanese Ōbaku school, was born (died 1673). * In the 8th year of the Bunsei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1825|en|1825|WD=Q6997|lt=1825}} – December 13): Arima Shinshichi, a proponent of the Sonnō jōi movement, was born (died 1862).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Ōei era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1398|en|1398|WD=Q6416|lt=1398}} – December 12): Ashikaga Ujimasa, a military commander, died. * In the 19th year of the Tenshō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1591|en|1591|WD=Q6766|lt=1591}} – December 19): Hojo Ujinao, lord of Odawara Castle, died (born 1562). * In the 1st year of the Keichō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1596|en|1596|WD=Q6785|lt=1596}} – December 23): Hattori Masanari (also known as Hattori Hanzō (Masanari)), a military commander and ninja master from Iga, died (born 1542). * In the 6th year of the Hōreki era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1756|en|1756|WD=Q7632|lt=1756}} – November 25): The second-generation head of Takeda Izumo, known as Zabon Takeda Izumo (Oyakata Izumo), a Joruri playwright and head of the Osaka Takeda Izumo theater, died (born 1691).

{{Not to be confused with|November 4|qq=November 4}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * In the 7th year of the Kaei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1854|en|1854|WD=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} – December 23): An 8.4-magnitude earthquake—the Kaei Great Earthquake (also known as the Ansei Tōkai Earthquake)—occurred with its epicenter in Suruga Bay. More than 10,000 people died, and the Tōkaidō region was cut off. A Russian warship, the Diana, anchored at Shimoda, was severely damaged by a tsunami. * In the 3rd year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} – December 25): The Tokyo Naval Depot was renamed the Naval Academy, and the Osaka Depot was renamed the Army Academy.
== Births == * In the 1st year of the Bunroku era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1592|en|1592|WD=Q6769|lt=1592|1=1592}} – December 7): Hidegen Takayuki, a Zen monk of the Ming dynasty and the founder of the Japanese Ōbaku school, was born (died 1673). * In the 8th year of the Bunsei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1825|en|1825|WD=Q6997|lt=1825|1=1825}} – December 13): Arima Shinshichi, a proponent of the Sonnō jōi movement, was born (died 1862).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Ōei era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1398|en|1398|WD=Q6416|lt=1398|1=1398}} – December 12): Ashikaga Ujimasa, a military commander, died. * In the 19th year of the Tenshō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1591|en|1591|WD=Q6766|lt=1591|1=1591}} – December 19): Hojo Ujinao, lord of Odawara Castle, died (born 1562). * In the 1st year of the Keichō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1596|en|1596|WD=Q6785|lt=1596|1=1596}} – December 23): Hattori Masanari (also known as Hattori Hanzō (Masanari)), a military commander and ninja master from Iga, died (born 1542). * In the 6th year of the Hōreki era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1756|en|1756|WD=Q7632|lt=1756|1=1756}} – November 25): The second-generation head of Takeda Izumo, known as Zabon Takeda Izumo (Oyakata Izumo), a Joruri playwright and head of the Osaka Takeda Izumo theater, died (born 1691).
